calendar.matters:
Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lilly Moallem for Timothy Dunne.

Ms. Moallem addressed the issue regarding payment to the Public Administrator for their services related to preserving the estate. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Maollem for Timothy Dunne (Administrator).

Ms. Moallem stated that the notice to the Franchise Tax Board ("FTB") was filed late, that she received a letter from the FTB indicating that there are no taxes currently due and that they are reserving an 18-month time period to file a claim, and that she is asking for a $20,000.00 reserve for any tax issues which should be more than sufficient. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to April 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Moallem is to file a declaration no later than April 9, 2014 stating whether the FTB filed a claim and outlining whether the rules of intestate succession have been followed. Ms. Moallem asked the Court to consider a preliminary distribution to assist the family. The Court bifurcated the issue of fees and took said matter under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Continued To Sep-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lilly Moallem for Irene Keschinger (Beneficiary).

The Court noted that Attorney Steven Weinkauf was not present and that nothing has been filed. Ms. Moallem stated that Irene Keschinger is the half sibling of the Decedent. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Steven Weinkauf to appear on September 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why an Amended Petition for Letters of Administration has not been filed and why he has not given notice. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
